installation_requirements.mounting: Placed on lift tracks, no permanent installation required
installation_requirements.positioning: Can be placed in any location along the length of tracks

features: Custom width - built to accommodate track spreads from 20 inches to 33 inches
12-inch long platform to facilitate the use of various jacking implements
Can be placed in any location along the length of tracks
Rolling wheels for repositioning along tracks
notes: This is an accessory/option for four-post lifts, not a standalone lift
Part number prefix JP-1525 suggests compatibility with 15,000-25,000 lb capacity lifts
Platform width is customizable based on track spread dimension 'A'
